---
name: Challenge submission
about: Submit your build for an open Augmented Wellness challenge.
title: "[challenge] <challenge NNN> — <your build name>"
labels: ["challenge", "submission"]
---

<!-- One submission per issue. Build in a fork; link it here. No secrets or personal data. -->

**Challenge**
e.g. `challenges/001-...` — link the challenge file.

**Your build**
- Fork / repo:
- PR (if any):
- Working demo or example run:

**One-paragraph summary**
What you built and why it answers the challenge.

**Acceptance criteria met**
<!-- Copy the criteria from the challenge and check what you hit. -->
- [ ] <criterion 1>
- [ ] <criterion 2>
- [ ] <criterion 3>

**Guardrails honored**
- [ ] Existing guardrails preserved (e.g. autonomy off by default, review gate intact).
- [ ] If health-related: nothing constitutes medical advice; no autonomous diagnosis/prescription.
- [ ] If it acts as a person: AI assistance is disclosed; no impersonation.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data committed.

**Anything else**
Notes for the judges (tradeoffs, what's still a stub, what you'd do next).
